mapper.sql: id, module_name, module_style, url, parent_id, grade, orders, opt_value, is_valid, create_date, update_date
mapper.insert:
insert into t_module
module_name, module_style, url, parent_id, grade, orders, opt_value, is_valid,
#{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moduleStyle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orders,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isValid,jdbcType=INTEGER},

insert into t_module (module_name, module_style, url, parent_id, grade, orders, opt_value, is_valid) values (#{moduleName}, #{moduleStyle}, #{url}, #{parentId}, #{grade}, #{orders}, #{optValue}, #{isValid})

insert into t_module (module_name, module_style, url, parent_id, grade, orders, opt_value, is_valid) values
(#{item.moduleName}, #{item.moduleStyle}, #{item.url}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.grade}, #{item.orders}, #{item.optValue}, #{item.isValid})
mapper.select: select from t_module where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and is_valid = 1
select from t_module where is_valid = 1 order by grade asc, orders asc

update.foreach: update t_module set module_name = #{item.moduleName} where id = #{item.id}

mapper.delete: update t_module set is_valid = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_module set is_valid = 0 where id in
#{item}
